name: PCIC AniSecure Rice/Corn Cover
description: Government crop insurance for RSBSA-registered rice/corn farmers. 100% premium subsidy (zero client cost) covering typhoon, flood, drought, and pests for one cropping season.

name: CARD MBA Family Micro-Life
description: Mutual benefit association term life with a funeral benefit rider, embedded in the member's existing FSP relationship.

name: CARD MBA Calamity Assist
description: Cash payout after a declared typhoon or flood in the insured municipality, activated through MBA membership.

name: Personal Accident Micro
description: Accidental death and disablement benefit with daily income support during recovery.

name: HuliSecure Fisher Income Cover
description: Income-shock protection for fishing households: payout when storm closures or gear loss interrupt catch income.

name: Hospital Cash Micro-Health
description: Fixed cash benefit per hospital day plus outpatient allowance, designed to top up PhilHealth. Requires an active purchasing decision.

name: Hospital Cash Lite
description: Entry-tier hospital cash benefit for thin-margin households.

name: Bahay & Negosyo Property Cover
description: Covers dwelling and small-business assets (store stock, tricycle, boat motor) against storm, flood, and fire damage.

name: CalamityShield Plus
description: Higher calamity payout tier with a faster parametric trigger on PAGASA storm signals.

name: Family Term Plus
description: Higher life-cover tier for households with several dependents.

name: Multi-Peril Crop Cover
description: Commercial multi-peril crop indemnity for farmers who are not (yet) RSBSA-registered and so fall outside PCIC's free coverage.
